briefs.title: BC Parks campsite fees raised and non-resident surcharge introduced, effective January 30
briefs.summary: BC Parks Recreation User Fees Regulation amended to raise camping and day-use fee ceilings and add a new $5–$30 surcharge per use for non-BC residents at provincial parks.
briefs.action_required: Update pricing displays and booking systems to reflect new fee ranges and the non-resident surcharge.

key_dates.label: BC Parks Recreation User Fees Regulation amendments take effect

briefs.industries: Natural Resources, Hotel & Accommodation, Transportation & Logistics
